description_long: This church is a large, rectangular stone building with a steeply pitched roof and a prominent bell tower on one end. The facade features tall, narrow arched windows and ornate stonework, including decorative columns and pointed arches above the main entrance. The side elevations display a series of evenly spaced arched windows, and the rear of the building is characterized by a polygonal apse. A large, mature tree is situated adjacent to one side of the church, partially obscuring the view. The structure is surrounded by a paved area and some greenery, suggesting it is set within an urban or suburban environment. The overall appearance is grand and historic, with architectural details reminiscent of Gothic Revival style.
description: A grand stone church with a tall bell tower, arched windows, and ornate Gothic Revival details, set beside a large tree and surrounded by pavement and greenery.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a pointed arch, flanked by decorative columns and a large central window above the door.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the length of the building, the series of arched windows, and the bell tower at the far end.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the polygonal apse and the tree adjacent to the building, with less architectural ornamentation visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the row of arched windows and the bell tower, with the tree more prominently visible.
